text.title: Laravel Layered Architecture Failure Modes
text.summary: 5 antipatterns observed in real Laravel layered codebases. Each pairs symptom + root cause + concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: Controller calls `User::create($request->all())` directly; unit-testing requires booting HTTP.
antipattern.root-cause: LLM took the shortest path; service layer felt redundant.
antipattern.fix: Extract logic into a `Service::create(CreateUserDTO $dto)` method; controller only validates + calls + wraps in Resource. Add a Pest test asserting service is unit-testable without HTTP.

antipattern.symptom: Service throws `InvalidArgumentException: HTTP request not bound` when invoked from a queue job.
antipattern.root-cause: Service called `request()->user()` or `auth()->id()`; not bound outside HTTP context.
antipattern.fix: Pass the authenticated user (or its id) as an explicit argument from the controller. Services receive only primitives / DTOs / models.

antipattern.symptom: Write claims to succeed; DB shows partial state; logs swallowed the actual exception.
antipattern.root-cause: `DB::transaction(...)` wrapped in `try/catch` that returned a success response.
antipattern.fix: Let the exception propagate to the framework exception handler. If a specific exception is recoverable, catch it AFTER the transaction closure (so rollback fires) and translate to an HTTP response.

antipattern.symptom: Every resource has `UserRepositoryInterface` + `UserRepository` with a single implementation; controllers call methods that just proxy to Eloquent.
antipattern.root-cause: LLM added repositories "for clean architecture" without an alternative implementation in mind.
antipattern.fix: Inject the Eloquent model into the service directly. Introduce a repository only when (a) multiple data sources exist, (b) you need to mock DB without a DB, or (c) explicit query encapsulation is required.

antipattern.symptom: Service returns `response()->json(...)`; queue job cannot reuse the method without an HTTP context.
antipattern.root-cause: Author returned `JsonResponse` from a service "to save controller code".
antipattern.fix: Return Eloquent model / DTO / array from service; controller wraps in `JsonResource` and returns.
